parameters.query: WITH upd AS (UPDATE auth_sessions SET last_used_at = NOW() WHERE token = $1 AND expires_at > NOW() RETURNING user_id) SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.is_admin FROM upd JOIN auth_users u ON u.id = upd.user_id;

SELECT json_build_object('violations', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(json_build_object('id',id,'title',title,'category',category,'criticality',criticality,'has_vec',(embedding IS NOT NULL)) ORDER BY id), '[]'::json) FROM kb_violations),'measures', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(json_build_object('id',id,'type',type,'name',name) ORDER BY id), '[]'::json) FROM kb_measures),'requirements', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(json_build_object('id',id,'text',text,'source',norm_ref) ORDER BY id), '[]'::json) FROM kb_requirements),'risks', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(json_build_object('id',id,'title',title) ORDER BY id), '[]'::json) FROM kb_risks),'norms', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(d ORDER BY d->>'doc_name'), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT json_build_object('doc_name',doc_name,'chunks',count(*),'has_vec',bool_or(embedding IS NOT NULL)) AS d FROM kb_norms GROUP BY doc_name) q)) AS kb;

parameters.jsCode: const r = $input.first().json; const kb = (r && r.kb) || {}; return [{ json: Object.assign({ ok: true, response: 'ok' }, kb) }];

parameters.query: WITH ins AS (INSERT INTO kb_violations (title, category, processes, description, criticality, embedding) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5, CASE WHEN $6='' THEN NULL ELSE $6::vector END) ON CONFLICT (title) DO UPDATE SET category=EXCLUDED.category, processes=EXCLUDED.processes, description=EXCLUDED.description, criticality=EXCLUDED.criticality, embedding=EXCLUDED.embedding RETURNING id), lm AS (INSERT INTO kb_violation_measure (violation_id, measure_id) SELECT (SELECT id FROM ins), unnest($7::int[]) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING RETURNING 1), lr AS (INSERT INTO kb_violation_requirement (violation_id, requirement_id) SELECT (SELECT id FROM ins), unnest($8::int[]) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING RETURNING 1), lk AS (INSERT INTO kb_violation_risk (violation_id, risk_id) SELECT (SELECT id FROM ins), unnest($9::int[]) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING RETURNING 1) SELECT (SELECT id FROM ins) AS id;

parameters.jsCode: const r=$input.first().json; if(!r||r.error||!r.id) return [{json:{ok:false,response:'error',error:'Не удалось сохранить нарушение: '+((r&&r.error&&(r.error.message||r.error))||'неизвестно')}}]; return [{json:{ok:true,response:'ok',id:r.id,message:'Нарушение сохранено в Базе знаний'+($('Эмбеддинг нарушения').first().json._vec?'':' (без вектора — эмбеддер недоступен, переиндексируйте позже)')}}];

parameters.query: INSERT INTO kb_measures (type, name, description, expected_effect) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4) ON CONFLICT (name) DO UPDATE SET type=EXCLUDED.type, description=EXCLUDED.description, expected_effect=EXCLUDED.expected_effect RETURNING id;

parameters.jsCode: const r=$input.first().json; if(!r||r.error||!r.id) return [{json:{ok:false,response:'error',error:'Не удалось сохранить меру: '+((r&&r.error&&(r.error.message||r.error))||'проверьте имя (должно быть уникальным)')}}]; return [{json:{ok:true,response:'ok',id:r.id,message:'Мера сохранена'}}];

parameters.query: INSERT INTO kb_requirements (text, norm_ref, criticality) VALUES ($1,$2,$3) RETURNING id;

parameters.jsCode: const r=$input.first().json; if(!r||r.error||!r.id) return [{json:{ok:false,response:'error',error:'Не удалось сохранить требование'}}]; return [{json:{ok:true,response:'ok',id:r.id,message:'Требование сохранено'}}];

parameters.query: INSERT INTO kb_norms (doc_name, doc_version, section, chunk_index, chunk_text, embedding) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5, CASE WHEN $6='' THEN NULL ELSE $6::vector END) ON CONFLICT (doc_name, doc_version, chunk_index) DO UPDATE SET chunk_text=EXCLUDED.chunk_text, embedding=EXCLUDED.embedding, section=EXCLUDED.section RETURNING id;

parameters.jsCode: const items=$input.all().map(i=>i.json); const n=items.filter(x=>x&&x.id).length; if(!n) return [{json:{ok:false,response:'error',error:'Не удалось сохранить нормативный документ (пустой текст?)'}}]; return [{json:{ok:true,response:'ok',message:'Нормативный документ сохранён: '+n+' фрагм. векторизовано'}}];

parameters.query: WITH dv AS (DELETE FROM kb_violations WHERE $1='violation' AND id=$2 RETURNING 1), dm AS (DELETE FROM kb_measures WHERE $1='measure' AND id=$2 RETURNING 1), dr AS (DELETE FROM kb_requirements WHERE $1='requirement' AND id=$2 RETURNING 1), dn AS (DELETE FROM kb_norms WHERE $1='norm' AND doc_name=$3 RETURNING 1) SELECT (SELECT count(*) FROM dv)+(SELECT count(*) FROM dm)+(SELECT count(*) FROM dr)+(SELECT count(*) FROM dn) AS n;

parameters.jsCode: const r=$input.first().json; const n=r&&r.n?Number(r.n):0; return [{json:{ok:n>0,response:n>0?'ok':'error',message:n>0?'Удалено':'Запись не найдена'}}];
